member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped view of a light–medium stained solid-wood dining table corner with a thick beveled top, carved apron and ornate carved legs; chairs are tucked underneath and small potted plants sit on the tabletop — close view, approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

Partial close-up of a dark brown, glossy wooden dining table edge with a bevelled corner and visible surface reflections and minor scuffs; a terracotta plant pot sits on the top surface — approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark glossy wooden cabinet top with a rounded beveled front edge; surface displays reflective sheen and minor scuffs, with a terracotta pot and scattered papers sitting on it — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown, glossy wooden dining table edge with a bevelled corner and visible surface reflections and minor scuffs; a terracotta plant pot sits on the top surface — approximate distance ~0.6 m from camera.

member_long_descriptions: Partial lower section of a dark-stained wooden chair showing glossy, curved legs and a horizontal stretcher; seat and back are cut off by the crop and the piece appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).
Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark reddish-brown varnished wooden chair back showing multiple curved vertical slats and a rounded top rail; appears photographed from roughly 0.6 meters away.
clusters.representative_description: Partial lower section of a dark-stained wooden chair showing glossy, curved legs and a horizontal stretcher; seat and back are cut off by the crop and the piece appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m).

member_descriptions: tall dark wood picture frame edge crop
member_long_descriptions: Rectangular, wall-mounted picture frame with a dark brown wooden moulding and thin gold inner trim containing a muted seascape of sailboats; image captured at an angled perspective with the left edge near the crop boundary and slight surface gloss visible — estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

Partial vertical crop showing a tall, narrow dark-brown wooden picture frame with a slim profile and visible inner artwork area behind glass; the frame is edge-cropped at top and bottom and shows slight surface reflection — approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Rectangular, wall-mounted picture frame with a dark brown wooden moulding and thin gold inner trim containing a muted seascape of sailboats; image captured at an angled perspective with the left edge near the crop boundary and slight surface gloss visible — estimated ~0.6 m from the camera.

member_long_descriptions: Close, edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown wooden rectangular dining table top with visible plank seams and a mostly smooth satin finish; the tabletop fills the crop and is partially cut off by the image border (approx. 1.2 m from camera).
clusters.representative_description: Close, edge-cropped view of a reddish-brown wooden rectangular dining table top with visible plank seams and a mostly smooth satin finish; the tabletop fills the crop and is partially cut off by the image border (approx. 1.2 m from camera).

member_long_descriptions: Edge-cropped partial dark metal chair showing a circular, ringed backrest with several curved slats and a shadowed, occluded lower seat area; appears photographed close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m) in low indoor light.
clusters.representative_description: Edge-cropped partial dark metal chair showing a circular, ringed backrest with several curved slats and a shadowed, occluded lower seat area; appears photographed close to the camera (approximately 1.2 m) in low indoor light.
